title: Onboarding Integrations (Hubspot)

posts.author: Onboardingsaas (Michael S)
posts.cookedHtml: I wanted to reach out to anyone that’s using Monday.com to onboard customers - currently housing all onboarding projects within monday.com and there are very little Hubspot/Monday integrations. I understand the addition of Zapier will allow for a much more robust integration/automation solution but just wanted to ask the monday.com onboarding community if there’s any tips or info on how to more closely align whats happening within Hubspot and monday. (Zapier the best route?) As well as if anyone’s using monday.com for onboarding and utilizes it on the client facing side as well.
